---
title: "3-23-26"
author: "Camilla Rosour"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
prisons <- read.csv("Prison_Boundaries.csv")
```

```{r}
x4 <- c(2, "times", TRUE, 4)
# when you run this code, everything becomes a character type
```

```{r}
x1 <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
x2 <- c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e")
x3 <- c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE)

x1 + x3
mean(x1)
mean(x3)
mean(x2)
```

Q4:

```{r}
sapply(prisons, typeof)
# telephone, SHAPE_Area, creationDate, VAL_Date, Source_DATE have the wrong type
```

Q5:

```{r}
as.integer(prisons$TELEPHONE)
as.integer(prisons$SHAPE_Area)
```

Q6:

```{r}
library(lubridate)
ymd_hms(prisons$EditDate)
year(prisons$CreationDate)
```
